interaction_map.trigger: User taps bell to view notifications
User interacts with reading session card

interaction_map.current_feedback: Native scroll snapping with manual mouse drag mapping
DOM class toggle with CSS transition overlay

animation_opportunities.description: Badge scales from 0 to 1 with spring physics when new notification arrives. Bell icon wiggles on unread increment.
animation_opportunities.trigger: Real-time state update from Supabase via useNotificationRealtime
animation_opportunities.reasoning: Draws user attention to social interactions without being overly intrusive.

animation_opportunities.description: Slide down and fade in from top-right origin.
animation_opportunities.reasoning: Softens the UI entry, making it feel native and premium rather than abrupt.

animation_opportunities.description: Scale down to 0.97 on press (Active state), lift up and slight shadow on hover.
animation_opportunities.reasoning: Provides tactile feedback that the card is interactable, vital for primary navigation elements.

animation_opportunities.description: Modal backdrop fade in, content scale-up from 0.95 to 1.0.
animation_opportunities.reasoning: Creates focus on the joining decision, preventing jarring pop-ins.

animation_opportunities.description: Crossfade between Login and AuthenticatedApp loading states.
animation_opportunities.reasoning: Currently auth state drops the loading spinner instantly, causing a harsh flash before the dashboard renders.

guidelines: Always provide immediate interaction feedback on touch/click.
Use spring physics for scale/position micro-interactions to mimic physical mass.
Entrance transitions should decelerate; exits should accelerate.
Stagger list items appearing (e.g., horizontal feed sessions) by 30-50ms.

sound_opportunities.description: Subtle organic 'pop' or light tap sound.

sound_opportunities.reasoning: Alerts the user they can now access a gated reading session.

sound_opportunities.description: Page turn or subtle paper rustle.
sound_opportunities.reasoning: Thematic sound that fits the BookCom brand when new reading material drops.

ux_gaps.impact: Reduces perceived UI quality during common interactions
ux_gaps.suggested_motion_or_sound: Add entrance animation with transform-origin top right.

ux_gaps.impact: Layout shifting when fetching sessions from Supabase
ux_gaps.suggested_motion_or_sound: Implement shimmering skeletons instead of blank space or simple spinners.

ux_gaps.impact: Hard to tell visually which state was active before clicking
ux_gaps.suggested_motion_or_sound: Add a sliding background pill that translates to the active language index.

performance_risks.reason: Mouse drag event listener updates scrollLeft rapidly, potentially causing layout thrashing if item renders are expensive.
performance_risks.recommended_constraint: Use CSS scroll-snap strictly for touch, and consider pointer-events: none on children while 'carousel-active' is present to avoid paint invalidations.

performance_risks.reason: Global state update on every Supabase insert event could re-render large application branches.
performance_risks.recommended_constraint: Throttle/batch incoming realtime updates before updating the store, and memoize NotificationItem aggressively.

high_impact_high_cost: Route transition crossfades (Auth -> Dashboard -> Session Detail)
Sound design implementation with user preference toggles
low_impact: Custom drag physics for HorizontalSessionCarousel (native CSS is usually fine)
